destinos.heroSubtitle: Explore the most incredible destinations in the world
destinos.destination1Desc: The city of lights offers romance, art, and unparalleled gastronomy. Stroll through the Champs-Elysees, visit the Louvre, and enjoy fresh croissants in charming cafes.
destinos.destination1Monuments: Eiffel Tower, Louvre, Notre-Dame, Arc de Triomphe
destinos.destination2Desc: Tropical paradise with crystal-clear waters and exclusive resorts. Overwater bungalows, exotic marine life diving, and unforgettable sunsets.
destinos.destination2Monuments: Malé Atoll, Maafushi Island, Dhigurah Island, Veligandu Island
destinos.destination3Desc: The city that never sleeps, full of culture, art, and entertainment. From Broadway to Central Park, every corner tells a story.
destinos.destination3Monuments: Empire State Building, Times Square, Central Park, Statue of Liberty
destinos.destination4Desc: Perfect fusion between millennial tradition and futuristic technology. Ancient temples beside neon skyscrapers, unique gastronomy.
destinos.destination4Monuments: Tokyo Tower, Shinjuku, Tsukiji Outer Market, Senso-ji Temple
destinos.destination5Desc: Paradise beaches and Mayan ruins in one place. Turquoise waters, mysterious cenotes, and vibrant nightlife.
destinos.destination6Desc: Luxury and modernity in the heart of the Arabian desert. Record-breaking skyscrapers, giant shopping centers, and unique experiences.
destinos.destination6Monuments: Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Jumeirah Palm, Museum of the Future
destinos.destination7Desc: The eternal city where history lives in every street. The Colosseum, the Vatican, artisanal gelato, and the Italian dolce vita.
destinos.destination7Monuments: Colosseum, Vatican, Artisanal Gelato, Italian Dolce Vita
destinos.destination8Desc: Greek islands with spectacular sunsets and iconic architecture. White houses with blue domes, local wines, and volcanic beaches.
destinos.destination8Monuments: Oia, Fira, Red Beach, Ancient Thera
destinos.destination9Desc: The Island of the Gods, known for its beaches, temples, and terraced rice fields. Surf, yoga, and vibrant culture await you.
destinos.destination9Monuments: Tanah Lot, Uluwatu Temple, Besakih Temple, Jatiluwih Rice Terraces
destinos.destination10Desc: Gaudí's architecture, Mediterranean beaches, and incredible tapas. A vibrant city where art, culture, and party meet.
destinos.destination10Monuments: La Sagrada Família, Park Güell, Casa Batlló, Palau de la Música Catalana
destinos.destination11Desc: The lost city of the Incas in the heights of the Andes. One of the wonders of the modern world, full of mystery and natural beauty.
destinos.destination11Monuments: Machu Picchu, Inca Trail, Sacred Valley, Huayna Picchu
destinos.destination12Desc: The capital of Britain with a millennial history, world-class museums, and vibrant cultural life. From Big Ben to Camden Town.
destinos.destination12Monuments: Big Ben, British Museum, Tower of London, Camden Town

pacotes.heroSubtitle: All inclusive for a worry-free trip
pacotes.package1Desc: 7 nights in a 4-star hotel with Eiffel Tower views, Michelin-starred dinner, and a Seine river cruise.
pacotes.package2Desc: 10 nights in an all-inclusive overwater resort with spa, diving, and a private beach dinner.
pacotes.package3Desc: 8 nights exploring temples, neon districts, gastronomy, and Japanese pop culture.
pacotes.package4Desc: 5 nights in Manhattan with Broadway tickets, museum visits, and a helicopter tour.
pacotes.package5Desc: 7 nights all-inclusive at a 5-star resort with Mayan ruins and cenote excursions.
pacotes.package6Desc: 6 nights of luxury with a desert safari, Burj Khalifa, and exclusive experiences.
pacotes.package7Desc: 5 nights discovering the Colosseum, the Vatican, and authentic Italian cuisine.
pacotes.package8Desc: 9 nights among temples, rice fields, and beaches. Includes a yoga retreat and surf lessons.
pacotes.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search

blog.heroSubtitle: Tips, guides and stories to inspire your next adventures
blog.art1Title: How to Travel on a Limited Budget
blog.art1Desc: Discover foolproof strategies to explore the world without compromising your finances. From cheap flights to budget accommodation.
blog.art2Desc: Everything you need to know to make the most of your week in the City of Light. Itineraries, restaurant tips and much more.
blog.art3Desc: A fascinating journey through the Japanese capital, where ancient temples coexist with the world's most advanced technology.
blog.art4Desc: Discover why the Maldives are the dream destination for honeymoons and luxury holidays. Resorts, diving and much more.
blog.art5Title: Bali: The Island of the Gods
blog.art5Desc: Mystical temples, terraced rice fields and world-class surfing. Everything about the Bali experience.
blog.art6Desc: Gaudi's city offers a perfect blend of art, architecture, beach and Mediterranean gastronomy.

contato.heroSubtitle: We are here to help you plan your perfect trip
contato.name: Name
contato.subject: Subject
contato.faq1Q: How can I book a trip?
contato.faq1A: You can book directly through our website by choosing the desired destination or package. You can also contact us by phone or email for personalized bookings.
contato.faq2A: We offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before the travel date for most packages. Check the specific terms of each booking.
contato.faq3A: Yes, all our packages include basic travel insurance. You can also opt for premium insurance with more comprehensive coverage.

privacidade.heroSubtitle: How we collect, use and protect your data
privacidade.intro: IPTrip respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal data you share with us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and what your rights are as a user of our website.
privacidade.s1Body: We collect the information you provide directly when creating an account, making a booking or contacting us, including name, email, phone number and the simulated payment details entered during checkout. We also collect information generated automatically through your use of the site, such as your chosen language, the destinations and packages you view, and the items saved in your wishlist.
privacidade.s2Item1: To create and manage your user account
privacidade.s2Item2: To process bookings and display your trip history on your dashboard
privacidade.s2Item3: To save and display your wishlist of favourite destinations
privacidade.s2Item4: To personalise content in your preferred language
privacidade.s2Item5: To respond to requests submitted through the contact form
privacidade.s2Item6: To improve the functionality and overall experience of the site
privacidade.s3Body: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, remember your preferences (such as language and login session) and analyse how the site is used. You can manage your cookie consent through the notice shown on your first visit, or by clearing your browser's browsing data.
privacidade.s4Body: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. Your information is only shared when necessary to provide the service (for example, with technical hosting providers) or when required by law.
privacidade.s5Body: We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or alteration. Passwords are stored in encrypted form. Please note that this site includes a simulated checkout flow for demonstration purposes — no real payment data is processed, stored or transmitted to banking entities.
privacidade.s6Body: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data at any time. You can update most of your information directly in your client area, or contact us to exercise any of these rights.
privacidade.s7Body: We keep your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to fulfil the purposes described in this policy. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
privacidade.s8Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of relevant changes through the site. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
privacidade.s9Body: For questions related to this Privacy Policy or the handling of your personal data, you can contact us through our contact page or the email address provided below.

termos.heroSubtitle: Conditions for using the IPTrip website and services
termos.intro: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the IPTrip website. By creating an account, browsing the site or making a booking, you accept these terms in full. If you do not agree with any of the conditions described here, you should stop using the site.
termos.s1Body: IPTrip is an online travel agency that allows you to explore destinations, browse travel packages, save favourites to a wishlist, and simulate bookings through a checkout process. This site was built for academic and demonstration purposes — the payment flow is simulated and no real financial transaction is processed.
termos.s2Body: To book a destination or package, or to save items to your wishlist, you need to create an account with a valid email and password. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential and for all activity carried out under your account.
termos.s3Item1: Bookings remain in a "pending" state until confirmed through the checkout process
termos.s3Item2: The checkout provided on this site is a simulation — no real payments or genuine banking details are processed
termos.s3Item3: After the simulated confirmation, the booking moves to a "confirmed" state and appears on your dashboard
termos.s3Item4: A confirmation message indicating that an email would be sent is shown, for illustrative purposes of the flow
termos.s4Body: You agree to use the site only for lawful purposes, not to interfere with its normal operation, not to attempt to access other users' accounts, and not to use the site to submit offensive, fraudulent or illegal content.
termos.s5Body: All content presented on the site — including text, logos, design and structure — belongs to IPTrip or is used under licence, unless stated otherwise. Reproduction in whole or in part without prior authorisation is not permitted.
termos.s6Body: The site and its content are provided "as is". As this is a demonstration platform, IPTrip does not guarantee continuous availability of the service and is not responsible for real travel decisions made based on the information presented here.
termos.s7Body: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Use at any time. Changes take effect as soon as they are published on the site. Continued use of the site after a change constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termos.s8Body: These Terms of Use are governed by Portuguese law, without prejudice to other applicable legal provisions depending on the user's location.
termos.s9Body: For questions about these Terms of Use, you can contact us through our contact page or the email address provided below.
